utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now compare each in the final plan:
- health_coverage: Present with physical and mental health insurance and a cost. It also includes unrelated items (adventure_travel_sports, technology_protection_add_on), but the required elements (physical and mental health with costs) are specified, and a total health cost is given. Considered fully specified.
- property_coverage: Present as home/contents insurance with a cost. Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Present with a plan and cost. It identifies inclusion within another plan and provides cost. Fully specified.
- additional_services: Present with an enhancement service and cost. Fully specified.
- total_budget: Present with monthly and annual cost breakdown. Fully specified.
All 5 required items are present and contain the needed details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Identify each item named in the final plan and match it to the exact item name in the ground-truth ratings. The plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health), InsurePlus Standard Plan (mental health), PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel/adventure), SecureLife Basic Coverage (home contents), and Technology Protection Add-on (which corresponds to Technology Protection under property_enhancement_services). Then extract their numeric ratings.
